data.title: Tech declines lead overall dip in January Ecommerce Stock Index results
data.description: Alibaba, 1-800-Flowers.com and Bed Bath & Beyond proved to be exceptions, going positive for the month as the overall ecommerce stock index fell by almost 6%.

data.title: SiteOne ramps up digital push as online sales jump in 2025
data.description: “Our digital initiative with siteone.com is also helping us drive organic daily sales growth, as our results have shown that customers who are engaged with us digitally grow significantly faster than those who are not,” CEO Doug Black said.

data.title: OpenAI expands agentic commerce push
data.description: By embedding structured product data and checkout flows directly into ChatGPT, OpenAI is seeking to position AI as the front door to commerce.

data.title: New Kroger CEO brings experience from Walmart and airline industry
data.description: Greg Foran replaces Ron Sargent, who served as Kroger's interim CEO since March 2025.

data.title: Google expands AI Mode's role in ecommerce tools
data.description: Google is also advancing what it calls “agentic commerce,” in which AI systems assist with or complete transactions on behalf of users.
